shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' | head -80 && rg -n \"in-selecting-range|selectingRange|isInSelectingRange|selectsRange\" src test* __tests__ 2>/dev/null | head -160"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '220,390p' src/month.tsx; rg -n \"<Day|month=\\{|month:\" src/month.tsx src/week.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx src/test/day_test.test.tsx | head -120"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,130p' src/test/day_test.test.tsx; rg -n \"outside-month|outside month|multi.*month|monthsShown\" src/test/day_test.test.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx src/test/datepicker_test.test.tsx | head -120"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function newDate|const newDate|newDate =\" src/date_utils.ts; sed -n '350,390p' src/date_utils.ts; sed -n '2920,2960p' src/test/datepicker_test.test.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '95,125p' src/date_utils.ts; sed -n '1,80p' src/test/test_utils.ts; rg -n \"setSystemTime|MockDate|202[0-9]\" src/test/day_test.test.tsx | head -30"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"Date|setSystemTime|useFakeTimers|NOW|beforeAll\" src/test jest.setup* jest.config.js | head -100; sed -n '1,100p' jest.config.js"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/day.tsx src/test/day_test.test.tsx'
